title: Fundamentos de JavaScript
description: Teste seus conhecimentos básicos sobre JavaScript.

questions.text: Qual palavra-chave declara uma variável com escopo de bloco?
Qual método converte JSON em objeto?
Qual operador verifica valor e tipo?
Qual tag representa o maior título?
Qual atributo define origem da imagem?

title: CSS Avançado
description: Conhecimentos sobre layout e estilização moderna.

questions.text: Qual propriedade centraliza itens no eixo principal?
Qual unidade é relativa ao viewport?
TypeScript é um superset de qual linguagem?
NestJS é baseado em qual padrão?

title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Test your knowledge about core JavaScript concepts including variables, types and operators.

questions.text: What is the result of typeof null?
Which keyword declares a block-scoped variable?
Which method converts JSON to object?
Which symbol is used for strict equality?

title: HTML Basics
description: Evaluate your understanding of fundamental HTML tags and document structure.

questions.text: Which tag represents the largest heading?

title: CSS Essentials
description: Check your knowledge about styling, layout systems and responsive design using CSS.

questions.text: Which layout system uses rows and columns?
Which property controls spacing outside an element?
Which value makes position relative to viewport?
Which unit is relative to root font size?

title: Node.js Basics
description: Assess your understanding of Node.js runtime, modules and backend fundamentals.

title: Database Concepts
description: Test your understanding of relational databases, SQL commands and data relationships.
